text:
Created attachment 240239
Screenshot of Thunderbird

My Thunderbird for the period is probably complete for developers@ (pictured) although if I understand correctly, you'll not need this. 

Maybe also complete for some (not all) other lists. 

If an email is from Bugzilla, I typically delete after reading, but I can't remember when I last emptied the bin, so I could probably recreate completeness for some lists – if no-one offers a better alternative. 

HTH
